title: FAQ - Maxema - Personalized and promotional pens designed in italy - Promotional writing instruments and business gadgets, custom printed pens. Company pens: personalized pens with your logo
description: FAQ - Maxema -  Promotional writing instruments and business gadgets. Company pens: Custom printed pens, personalized pens with your company logo.

headings.text: DO YOU SELL YOUR PRODUCTS TO END CUSTOMERS TOO OR SELL EXCLUSIVELY TO PROMOTIONAL ARTICLE DISTRIBUTORS ?
CAN YOU PROVIDE PENS WITH REFILL COLOURS OTHER THAN BLUE AND BLACK?
I WOULD LIKE TO PERSONALISE ONE OF YOUR ARTICLES BUT HAVE NO GRAPHIC DESIGN FACILITIES, CAN YOU HELP ME?
WHAT FORMAT IS REQUIRED FOR THE FILES TO BE PRINTED?
WHAT COLOURS CAN BE PRINTED ON MAXEMA PENS?
IS IT POSSIBLE TO CREATE A ONE-OF-A-KIND PEN BY COMBINING PARTS IN DIFFERENT COLOUR?
CAN I DOWNLOAD THE IMAGES OF THE PENS AND YOUR PRICE LIST DIRECTLY FROM YOUR WEBSITE?
CAN I HAVE PART OF MY ORDER ASSEMBLED WITH BLACK REFILLS AND ANOTHER PORTION WITH BLUE REFILLS?
CAN YOU SUPPLY PENS WITH PARKER GEL INK REFILLS?
ARE ALL THE PENS ITALIAN MADE?

mainText: Italiano English Reserved Area Contacts Company Pens Customisation Sample kits Finishes Recycled pens More maxema ® via vittime delle foibe 15 10088 volpiano torino italy t +39 011 970 4500 f +39 011 970 4550 maxema@maxema.com P PRODUCTS Our pens Kind / Kind / Icon Pure / Flow Pure / Dot / Zink / Pixel / Bay / Mood Metal / Kind / Mood / Flow / View / Tag Green / Next / Tag / Icon / Icon green / Ethic Search by color rose/purple azure / blue green yellow/orange red cream/brown grey black white select a color S Services customisation packaging pantone colors sample kits C COMPANY Maxema Company contacts FAVORITES SAMPLE KITS ACCOUNT FAQ MEDIA DISCLAIMER DO YOU SELL YOUR PRODUCTS TO END CUSTOMERS TOO OR SELL EXCLUSIVELY TO PROMOTIONAL ARTICLE DISTRIBUTORS ? 01 Maxema sells its products solely to promotional article distributors or agents, it never deals with end customers directly. CAN YOU PROVIDE PENS WITH REFILL COLOURS OTHER THAN BLUE AND BLACK? 02 Maxema pens with special colour refills can be had by ordering a minimum quantity of 50,000 pieces, or possibly even smaller quantities depending on stock availability. I WOULD LIKE TO PERSONALISE ONE OF YOUR ARTICLES BUT HAVE NO GRAPHIC DESIGN FACILITIES, CAN YOU HELP ME? 03 If you cannot produce graphics in vector format, contact our sales office: we shall help you find the solution best in keeping with your indications and goals. Our graphics design service is billed based on the cost of the final product. WHAT FORMAT IS REQUIRED FOR THE FILES TO BE PRINTED? 04 The files must always be submitted in vector format, with the text converted into curves by means of programs for PC (Adobe Illustrator up to version CS4, Corel Draw up to version CS5, pdf or eps formats). WHAT COLOURS CAN BE PRINTED ON MAXEMA PENS? 05 We can print colours from the following colour charts: PANTONE - Pantone Solid Coated + CMYK selections for four-colour processes and photographic images. Keep in mind that on a white surface a colour will match its ID code, whereas against a coloured background colours might be altered. This is the reason why we advise against printing light colours against a dark background, unless one can do a double pass or apply a preliminary white base coat, but in this manner the cost of printing will be doubled. We do not supply fluorescent colours, hot printing or laser engraving services. There is no extra charge for silver and gold colours. Our graphics office reserves the right to verify the feasibility of a project. IS IT POSSIBLE TO CREATE A ONE-OF-A-KIND PEN BY COMBINING PARTS IN DIFFERENT COLOUR? 06 Yes, you can create your own pen by assembling different colour parts. In this case, the minimum quantity to be ordered is 5,000 pieces. We recommend that you contact our sales office beforehand to assess the feasibility of your projects and cost differences, if any. MINIMUM QUANTITIES FOR PANTONE COLOURS? 07 We can produces our articles with Pantone colours. Contact our sales office for information on minimum quantities and prices. CAN I DOWNLOAD THE IMAGES OF THE PENS AND YOUR PRICE LIST DIRECTLY FROM YOUR WEBSITE? 08 From our website you can download freely our catalogue in pdf format. From reserved areas you can also download high- and low-resolutions images of the individual pens and our price lists: to access these areas you must obtain an ad hoc password from our sales office, which on this occasion will also provide you with a special basic discount to be applied to our price list. CAN I REQUEST SPECIAL PACKAGING? 09 You may request special packaging solutions (cardboard boxes with pens in assorted colours, pens enclosed in cellophane envelopes, etc.): contact our sales office for details and quotations. CAN I HAVE PART OF MY ORDER ASSEMBLED WITH BLACK REFILLS AND ANOTHER PORTION WITH BLUE REFILLS? 10 Yes, you can: make sure you communicate your request to our sales office when ordering. CAN YOU SUPPLY PENS WITH PARKER GEL INK REFILLS? 11 Yes, we can: please contact our sales office for quotations and minimum quantities. ARE ALL THE PENS ITALIAN MADE? 12 All our pens are designed and manufactured at our plants in Volpiano (Turin) using top-quality non-toxic Italian made materials, ABS, and Dokumental inks from Germany. via vittime delle foibe 15 10088 volpiano torino italy t +39 011 970 4500 f +39 011 970 4550 maxema@maxema.com MAXEMA SRL P.IVA 05321380015 privacy policy var acceptText='Accetto'; var policy_url='/cookie_privacy_policy/en'; var cookie_message='Il sito www.maxema.com utilizza cookie esclusivamente tecnici per permettere una corretta navigazione e la completa fruizione di tutti i contenuti da parte dell\'utente. Non utilizziamo in alcun modo cookie di profilazione.'; var acceptText='I Understand'; var policy_url='/cookie_privacy_policy/en'; var cookie_message='This site uses cookies to improve their services and experience of readers. If you decide to continue browsing we consider that you accept their use.'; $(document).ready(function(){ $.cookieBar({ message: cookie_message, acceptButton: true, acceptText: acceptText, policyButton: true, policyText: 'Privacy Policy', policyURL: policy_url, autoEnable: true, acceptOnContinue: false, acceptOnScroll: false, acceptAnyClick: false, expireDays: 365, renewOnVisit: false, forceShow: false, bottom:true, fixed:true, domain: 'www.maxema.com', referrer: 'www.maxema.com' }); }); img.img-social {width: 16px;height: 16px;opacity: .6;transition: ease .5s;position: relative;top: 3px;} img.img-social:hover {opacity: 1;} .img-social-footer {filter: brightness(0.2);} .img-social-radius {width: 20px;height: 20px;display: inline-block;} .social_header {width: 84px !important;text-align: center;background: unset !important;}
